name: Hachi-Roku
description: The iconic panda. Light, nimble, and timeless. Where legends begin.

name: The Silver Bullet
description: Rear-wheel drive perfection. Slides like it was born to drift.

name: Rotary Ghost
description: Twin-rotor screamer. Light and fast with that unmistakable wail.

name: Street King
description: FF legend. High-revving VTEC, impossible cornering speed.

name: The Black Knight
description: Wide-body aggression. Power everywhere, grip when you need it.

name: The Widow Maker
description: Sequential twin-turbo rotary. Beautiful and treacherous in equal measure.

name: Rally God
description: AWD, turbocharged fury. Eats weather for breakfast.

name: Godzilla
description: The car that rewrote the rulebook. ATTESA AWD, twin-turbo RB26.

name: The Doctor
description: Mid-engine balance engineered by Ayrton Senna. Precision personified.

name: Emperor
description: The pinnacle. 6-speed, ATTESA Pro, twin-turbo. Bred for the Nürburgring.

name: 2JZ Legend
description: Built to be tuned. The 2JZ-GTE is basically indestructible.

name: Final Form
description: The last true Evo. Every lesson learned, perfected.

name: The Prototype
description: 400 units. Wide-arch, EJ22 punched out. A homologation special that became a myth.

name: Panda God
description: The Hachi-Roku pushed to its absolute limit. Race-prepared, stripped out, obsessively tuned.

name: Final Rotation
base_model: FD RX-7 Spirit R Type A
description: The last FD ever built. 1,500 units. Factory lightweight, factory perfection.
